verses.text: Hunted and harassed, David asks God's mercy, for foes would swallow him up all day. He is pressed on every side. When men crowd in against us, God is the refuge to which we cry.
Hunted and harassed, David asks God's mercy, for foes would swallow him up all day. He is pressed on every side. When men crowd in against us, God is the refuge to which we cry.

'What time I am afraid, I will trust in thee,' he resolves; trusting God's word, 'I will not fear what flesh can do unto me.' Faith answers fear. The promise of God outweighs all that mortal man can threaten.

'What time I am afraid, I will trust in thee,' he resolves; trusting God's word, 'I will not fear what flesh can do unto me.' Faith answers fear. The promise of God outweighs all that mortal man can threaten.
His enemies twist his words and lie in wait for his life; he asks God to cast them down. Slander dogs him. He commits the malicious to the God who judges all.
His enemies twist his words and lie in wait for his life; he asks God to cast them down. Slander dogs him. He commits the malicious to the God who judges all.
His enemies twist his words and lie in wait for his life; he asks God to cast them down. Slander dogs him. He commits the malicious to the God who judges all.
God counts his wanderings and keeps his tears 'in thy bottle,' written in His book. No grief is forgotten. Every tear of the believer is treasured and remembered by God.
God counts his wanderings and keeps his tears 'in thy bottle,' written in His book. No grief is forgotten. Every tear of the believer is treasured and remembered by God.
Again he praises God's word and repeats, 'in God I have put my trust: I will not be afraid.' The refrain seals his faith. Resting on God's promise, fear loses its grip.
Again he praises God's word and repeats, 'in God I have put my trust: I will not be afraid.' The refrain seals his faith. Resting on God's promise, fear loses its grip.

He owns his vows and gives thanks, for God has delivered his soul from death, that he may 'walk before God in the light of the living.' Rescue is for service. Saved from death, the believer lives to walk with God.
